metrics.name: academorix.organization.rows.total
metrics.description: Count of Organizations by status (active / paused / archived) across the platform. Emitted every 60s by the observability sweeper.

metrics.name: academorix.organization.rows.per_tenant
metrics.description: Distribution of active Organizations per tenant. Detects tenants approaching the Enterprise unlimited-cap territory.

metrics.name: academorix.organization.create.total
metrics.description: source: api / cli / seeder / reconciler. category: the org's category enum.

metrics.name: academorix.organization.reparent.total
metrics.description: reason: manual / entitlement_flatten / support. entitlement_flatten fires on downgrade cascades.

metrics.name: academorix.organization.reparent.descendants_recomputed
metrics.description: How many descendants had their tree_path recomputed per reparent. Detects unusually large restructurings.

metrics.name: academorix.organization.reparent.duration_ms
metrics.description: End-to-end reparent duration including RebuildTreePathsJob completion.

metrics.name: academorix.organization.default_invariant.violations
metrics.description: kind: zero_defaults / multiple_defaults. Fires from ReconcileDefaultOrganizationInvariantJob. Non-zero → page ops.

metrics.name: academorix.organization.tree_path_drift.count
metrics.description: Rows detected with tree_path inconsistent with parent_id. Should stay flat at zero — non-zero indicates DB manipulation outside the observer.

metrics.name: academorix.organization.slot.utilisation_pct
metrics.description: How full the organization_slot allowance runs per tenant. Fires the entitlement-approaching-cap notification at ≥ 80%.

metrics.name: academorix.organization.middleware.resolve.duration_ms
metrics.description: organization.resolve_active middleware duration. P99 target < 10 ms.

metrics.name: academorix.organization.middleware.resolve.source
metrics.description: source: header / user_default / tenant_default. Where the active org came from.

metrics.name: academorix.organization.cache.hit_ratio
metrics.description: Redis hit ratio per cache pattern (default / tree / descendants / ancestors / by-id / by-slug / slot_usage).

metrics.name: academorix.organization.observer.refusals
metrics.description: reason: cross_tenant_parent / cycle / depth_exceeded / has_descendants / in_use / is_default / status_invalid. operation: create / update / delete / reparent.

metrics.name: academorix.organization.purge_blocked.total
metrics.description: reason: has_descendants / referenced_by_branches. Rows that PurgeArchivedOrganizationsJob refused to purge; still held under retention.
